auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.

sell.heroTitle: List your property in Morocco — for free
sell.heroSubtitle: Reach buyers from the US, Canada, and Morocco. Post in minutes, get contacted directly.
sell.step1Desc: Add photos, set your price, and describe your property in a few minutes.
sell.step2Desc: Buyers reach you directly by WhatsApp, phone, or email — no middleman.
sell.step3Desc: Close the deal on your own terms. We never take a commission.
sell.why1Desc: No commission, no subscription, no hidden fees — ever.
sell.why2Desc: Your listing reaches Moroccans in the US, Canada, and worldwide.
sell.why3Desc: Buyers message you instantly — the way Moroccans prefer to communicate.
sell.why4Desc: Edit, pause, or delete your listing anytime from your account.
sell.finalDesc: It's free, takes 5 minutes, and your listing reaches buyers locally and internationally.

home.trustNorthAmerica: Serving Moroccans in the US & Canada
home.trustInternational: Trusted by buyers in the US & Canada
home.diasporaTitle: Buying from the US or Canada?
home.diasporaDesc: Maroclist makes it easy to search, compare, and connect with property owners in Morocco — even if you are abroad. Our platform is designed to help international buyers invest with confidence.
home.diasporaPoint3: No travel required to get started
home.heroMsg: Maroclist makes it easy to search, compare, and connect with property owners in Morocco. Even if you are abroad. Our platform is designed to help international buyers invest with confidence.
home.feat1Desc: Filter by city, price, type and area in seconds
home.feat2Desc: Every listing is linked to an authenticated account
home.feat3Desc: WhatsApp, phone or email — no middleman
home.feat4Desc: Post your listing for free, no hidden fees
home.feat5Desc: Browse Morocco properties from the US or Canada — in English, at your own pace
